personas.name: Social Theorist
biases_to_disclose: weighs systemic critique heavily; penalizes individualist framings

personas.name: Frugal Engineer
biases_to_disclose: rewards low BOM cost; penalizes premium positioning

personas.name: Ecological Conscience
biases_to_disclose: penalizes ideas that increase material throughput

personas.name: Empathic Designer
biases_to_disclose: rewards ideas grounded in specific human moments

personas.name: Contrarian Strategist
biases_to_disclose: penalizes any idea another team is likely already pursuing

personas.name: Ethical Auditor
biases_to_disclose: penalizes dual-use risks; will not pick novelty over safety

personas.name: Speed Maximalist
biases_to_disclose: rewards ideas that can be tested in 2 weeks

personas.name: Aesthetic Critic
values: what makes someone tell a friend
biases_to_disclose: penalizes utilitarian framings devoid of feeling
